title: Social Responsibility - Definition, Examples, Business, What is It?
content: Socialresponsibilityreflects the individuals' and organizations'responsibilityto act in the best interest of their society and engage in activities contributing tosocialdevelopment. It has four types: economic, environmental, philanthropic, and ethical. Applying theconceptin business creates corporatesocialresponsibility(CSR).
